text: **Empire Algorithm Picks **🔥
ocr_texts: (1u)ARIZONASTATE+8(-130) Texas Tech is the better team on paper, the matchup profile and game environment point strongly () h sd e e e 72.4 (#111), while Texas Tech scores 82.0 (#43) and allows 79.2 (#299), which already tells you these teams play in very different types of games. Arizona State makes 18.0 free throws per game (#35) compared to Texas Tech allowing 13.5 (#89), which is huge for a team trying to shorten the game and keep it close. Texas Tech relies heavily on the three, making 11.5 threes per game (#6), but Arizona State does a solid job limiting opponent threes to 6.5 made per game (#39), which directly attacks Tech's biggest offensivestrength. With ASU's ability to score, get to the line, protect the rim, and limit Tech's biggest weapon from three, this sets up as a classic home underdog spot.
